revision.comment: Created page with ".mw-body-content a:link { color: #0000FF; } /* normal unvisited links */ .mw-body-content a:link:visited { color: #0000FF; } /* visited links */ .mw-body-content a:link:active { color: #FF0000; } /* active links */ .mw-body-content a:link.new { color: #FF0000; } /* new links */ .mw-body-content a:link.extiw { color: #3366BB; } /* interwiki links */ .mw-body-content a:link.external { color: #3366BB; } /* external links */ .mw-body-content a:link.stub { color: #772233; } /..."
Replaced content with "a:visited { color: #0645ad; /* Standard blue link color */ }"

revision.text: /* Keeps visited links the same color as regular links */ a:visited {color: #0645ad; /* This is the standard MediaWiki blue */}
